name: High-Density Lipoproteins (HDL)
description: This test case evaluates the ability to identify patients with low levels of high-density lipoproteins (HDL), a cardiovascular risk factor. The phenotype queries for HDL cholesterol laboratory measurements.
prompt: Find all patients who have had HDL cholesterol measurements performed, particularly those with low HDL levels (less than 40 mg/dL for men or less than 50 mg/dL for women).

required_codes.display: Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma ultracentrifugate
